title: Harvista
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ecdc38be524a0a07cbca1542d4518803c83fcdb4.png)

> Round lotus pads float on the stream,  
> Tiny leaves adrift like a dream;  
> Slender wheat lets blossoms fly,  
> Light as breeze in summer’s sky.

**「Harvista」** is a leisure, development-oriented sweet modpack. Within **「Harvista」**, you'll embark on a long journey from steam engines to the vast expanse of the stars: start with simple machinery, develop industry, and build automation networks; ultimately soar through the skies to see the myriad stars like dust. **「Harvista」** also features a rich and engaging culinary system. Experiment with cooking diverse delicacies, delve into a wealth of gourmet recipes, earn milestones on your agricultural path, and pursue the legendary **「CatBurger」**. Immerse yourself in tranquility while strolling through exquisite settlements, or embrace the challenge of the unknown and conquer formidable foes... The story of **「Harvista」** is yours to unfold.

## Overview

**Technology**:**「Harvista」** aims to craft a fresh technological journey. We’ve selected cutting-edge mods like **Oritech** and **stellaris**, boldly stepping away from traditional mods like IC2 and Create. The new mods feature stunning **animation effects**, turning mechanical operations into visual delights. They preserve classic elements while introducing unique mechanisms and content through thoughtful design. We’ve also implemented specialized **compatibility optimizations** for tech mods, building a self-consistent technological ecosystem.

**Agriculture**:**「Harvista」** fully removes beyond homogenized farming mods like Farmer’s Delight and the "Let's Do" series, opting instead for niche gems like Caupona and EveryXHotpot. Through thoughtful mod pairing, 「Harvista」 offers rich gameplay and a compatible cooking system, delivering a layered culinary experience.

**World Generation**: **「Harvista」**  introduces diverse new biomes and structures, bringing fresh allies and foes. We’ve optimized world generation for harmony, ensuring modded structures **generate correctly within modded biomes** to enhance exploration immersion.

**Less is More**: More mods aren’t always better—only through careful curation can a modpack achieve magic. As a lightweight pack, **「Harvista」**  meticulously selects **141 mods** to build a comprehensive yet streamlined gameplay system, rejecting bloat and redundancy.

**Smooth Experience**: **「Harvista」** is deeply optimized for performance-quality balance. It retains stunning visuals while ensuring stable frame rates and smooth gameplay. Even in late-game factory hubs, TPS remains stable.

- **Recommended Specs**: Intel® Core™ i5-10400, NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3050, 6GB RAM allocation
- **Minimum Specs**: Intel® Core™ i5-7400, NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1050, 4GB RAM allocation
- **Tested Performance**: Intel® Core™ Ultra 9 285H + NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5060 | 1080p + Complementary Shaders (High Preset) | Average 121 FPS

_Tip: If experiencing lag, try disabling heavy client-side mods like Particular. A performance-focused Lite version is planned for future release._

## FAQ

**Q: My game is stuttering/lagging!**  
**A:** _Harvista_ is a modern modpack built for the latest Minecraft version and has certain system requirements. Try disabling shaders, lowering graphics settings, or removing high-impact visual mods (e.g., **Particular**).

**Q: There are two suns in my sky!**  
**A:** Some shaders (e.g., **Complementary Shaders**) conflict with the modified skybox from stellaris mods. Load the resource pack **HarvistaCompat** to resolve this. _Do not enable this pack if no issue exists!_

**Q: Structures aren’t generating properly!**  
**A:** _Harvista_ has dedicated world-generation compatibility fixes, making this issue highly unlikely. Verify that the **HarvistaCompat datapack** is loaded at the _top_ of your datapack list.

**Q: I found a bug / My game crashed!**  
**A:** Sorry you encountered this! Please report it via our **Feedback Page** or inquire on our **social media channels**. We’ll assist as soon as possible.

**Q: The new modpack version breaks my old save!**  
**A:** Saves from **pre-1.20.1** (Harvista v2.x.x or earlier) are _unrecoverable_ due to extensive mod changes—start a new world. For **v3.x saves**, check **compatibility notes** in the _Changelog_ before updating.
